testcase.name: @BeforeTest beforeTest

failure.message:
Failed to connect to binary FirefoxBinary(C:\Program Files (x86)\Mozilla Firefox\firefox.exe) on port 7055; process output follows: fter return statement JavaScript warning: https://www.google.com/js/th/iVFoLhkJxhTbgXp7MGz6Uw8IeYsKvIgztj8Nn2RZZN8.js line 2 > eval, line 6462: unreachable code after return statement JavaScript warning:
